data.raceName: BONUS BACK TOKENS WITH BETDELUXE HEAT 3
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. GUS THE GREAT was below best latest but did hit the frame in quick time two back when second (19.08) at Q Straight in a Grade 5. Safe beginner and drawn well on the inside. Look for sharp improvement here. 4. JACKPOT JUNIOR racing well without winning, placing at his last five runs. Last start finished 2nd on April 12 over 407m at this track behind Raptor Girl beaten a neck (23.95) in a Grade 5. Solid beginner who can clear the tricky draw. Overdue and gets his chance. 2. RUPEE RANGER finds it hard to win. Hit the board with a minor placing last time when second (23.80) at this track. Bold showing expected. 6. CAPPUCCINA was out of the money here last time out but can bounce back.","runners":[1,4,2,6],"exclusive":false}
